title: Ore transformers
description: transform cobblestone into ores (hard to craft)
body:
!!!!THIS CONTENT IS NOT RESERVED/REGISTRED/COPYRIGHTED AND WILL PROPABLY NEVER BE!!!!


sorry for the poorly made textures

This mod adds ore transformers that can be used to transform cobblestone into ore 
you put 1 cobblestone into it click the button and you have an ore.


# planned changes
Remake the textures to a machine like style\
remake the arrow texture or make it animated\
make an gamerule for the amount of ores from 1 cobble or how many cobble for 1 ore\
remake the icon
